bird.summary: The dark-winged trumpeter or green-winged trumpeter (Psophia viridis) is a species of bird in the family Psophiidae. It is endemic to Brazi…

locations.name: 亞馬遜盆地
locations.summary: 亞馬遜盆地（葡萄牙語：Bacia do rio Amazonas），又稱亞馬遜平原，是南美洲的亞馬遜河及其支流所流經之處，盆地與平原地形兼具。 地理 南美洲的亞馬遜雨林（60%面積位於巴西）位於亞馬遜盆地，是全球最大的雨林，佔地6百萬平方…

relations.subject: Dark-winged trumpeter
relations.evidence: The dark-winged trumpeter is found in the Amazon Basin of Brazil south of the Amazon River

relations.subject: Dark-winged trumpeter
